completed_steps.summary: Classified as monorepo with 2 parts: frontend (desktop, Electron/React) and backend (backend, Python/Claude Agent SDK)
Discovered 8 existing docs from previous scan (2026-02-22). User selected full rescan.
Deep scan of tech stack: Frontend (Electron 40, React 19, TS 5.9, Zustand 5, Tailwind 4, Radix UI, xterm.js 6), Backend (Python 3.12+, Claude Agent SDK 0.1.39+, Graphiti, Pydantic 2)
Deep scan of critical directories: frontend components (90+), stores (31), IPC handlers (84+), backend agents, spec pipeline, QA, security, integrations
Generated integration-architecture.md with IPC patterns, external service integrations, data flows
Generated architecture-backend.md and architecture-frontend.md via parallel subagents
Generated component-inventory.md, development-guide.md, deployment-guide.md via parallel subagents
Validation and finalization complete. All 8 documentation files + index generated.

findings.project_classification: Monorepo with 2 parts: Electron/React desktop frontend + Python agent backend, connected via npm workspaces, version 2.7.14

resume_instructions: Full scan complete. All documentation generated.
